'''chavudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scalene|scalene]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-v-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scalene|scalene]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chavudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chævidhith|chævidhith]] || [[word:chævidhij|chævidhij]] || [[word:chævidhish|chævidhish]] || [[word:chævidhi|chævidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chavuvudhuth|chavuvudhuth]] || [[word:chavuvudhuj|chavuvudhuj]] || [[word:chavuvudhush|chavuvudhush]] || [[word:chavuvudhu|chavuvudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chavudhuth|chavudhuth]] || [[word:chavudhuj|chavudhuj]] || [[word:chavudhush|chavudhush]] || [[word:chavudhu|chavudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chavufdhuth|chavufdhuth]] || [[word:chavufdhuj|chavufdhuj]] || [[word:chavufdhush|chavufdhush]] || [[word:chavufdhuf|chavufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chavudhuthu|chavudhuthu]] || [[word:chavudhuju|chavudhuju]] || [[word:chavudhushu|chavudhushu]] || [[word:chavudhuku|chavudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chavudhuth|chavudhuth]] || [[word:chavudhuj|chavudhuj]] || [[word:chavudhush|chavudhush]] || [[word:chavudhu|chavudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chavudhuthul|chavudhuthul]] || [[word:chavudhujul|chavudhujul]] || [[word:chavudhushul|chavudhushul]] || [[word:chavudhukul|chavudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chavudhuthuthu|chavudhuthuthu]] || [[word:chavudhujuju|chavudhujuju]] || [[word:chavudhushushu|chavudhushushu]] || [[word:chavudhuku|chavudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chavudhuthun|chavudhuthun]] || [[word:chavudhujun|chavudhujun]] || [[word:chavudhushun|chavudhushun]] || [[word:chavudhukun|chavudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chavudhuthuoro|chavudhuthuoro]] || [[word:chavudhujuoro|chavudhujuoro]] || [[word:chavudhushuoro|chavudhushuoro]] || [[word:chavudhukuoro|chavudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
